security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: data:; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:11434 https://api.openai.com https://api.anthropic.com https://api.oclushion.com https://cdn.oclushion.com https://api.vercel.com https://api.github.com https://api.linear.app https://api.notion.com

bundle.shortDescription: AI-native desktop IDE for secure real-world software development.
bundle.longDescription: Oclushion turns repositories into AI-ready workspaces with intelligent context, skillpacks, Sano Shield privacy, Safe Diff review, and enterprise audit trails.
